name: Chicken Garden Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 each Green bell pepper, cored, sliced
1 each Large carrot, cut into 3-inch strips
1 each Medium zucchini, cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the chicken in oil.
2. Sprinkle with rosemary and salt and pepper to taste (if desired).
3. Add the remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
4. Cover and cook for 3 minutes over medium heat.
5. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until thickened.
